overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a player walking through a homeless encampment beneath a massive urban overpass. The scene transitions from a dimly lit, cluttered interior space filled with tents and debris to a bright, sunlit city street with modern skyscrapers and palm trees visible in the distance.

events.description: emerges from narrow corridor blocked by blue tarps into the open underpass encampment area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the cluttered encampment, observing makeshift shelters and scattered debris under the overpass

entered.detail: large blue plastic sheeting blocking the initial path
massive support column for the overpass structure
metal fencing with diamond pattern partially covered by tarps
cluster of tents and temporary shelters made from tarps and cardboard
underside of the concrete bridge deck with visible structural beams
scattered boxes and trash littering the concrete ground

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow corridor blocked by blue tarps before opening into a wide underpass area. The space is dimly lit with sunlight filtering through gaps, revealing a homeless encampment with tents, cardboard debris, and concrete support pillars. The player walks forward exploring the cluttered environment.

events.description: slows approach and circles around an armed individual standing near tents
the armed NPC turns to face the camera and appears to react to the player's presence

agents.ego_description: approaching and circling an armed NPC while observing the encampment surroundings and nearby fires

notable_agents.action: standing guard holding a rifle, turns to face the player and tracks their movement

entered.detail: character wearing casual clothing and holding a long rifle
yellow metal crowd control barrier lying on its side
camping tent with red and white panels next to a shopping cart
metal drum with visible flames providing light and smoke
concrete wall covered in colorful spray paint tags

segments.scene_description: The player approaches an armed NPC standing among tents and debris. The NPC, holding a rifle, turns to face the player as they circle around. Burning barrels provide warm light against the cool shadows of the overpass, while graffiti-covered walls and scattered barricades define the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition from underpass to sunlit urban street

events.description: exits the shadow of the overpass into bright direct sunlight causing lens flare
transitions from enclosed encampment to open city street with visible skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: walking past the NPC and continuing toward the bright exit of the underpass into the city

entered.detail: tall palm trees visible in the distance against the bright sky
tall glass and steel buildings with digital billboards
open asphalt road with lane markings and scattered puddles
overhead electrical cables stretching across the street
vehicles parked along the side of the road
makeshift shelter with green tarp and american flag pattern

segments.scene_description: The player moves past the NPC and walks toward the exit of the underpass. The lighting shifts dramatically from shadow to bright sunlight as they emerge onto a city street. Modern skyscrapers and palm trees become visible in the distance, contrasting sharply with the grim encampment left behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim, cluttered urban underpass into the blinding brightness of a modern city street. It begins in a narrow corridor blocked by blue tarps, which soon opens into a wide, shadowed encampment filled with tents, cardboard debris, and massive concrete pillars. As the camera moves deeper into the space, it circles an armed NPC standing near burning barrels that cast a warm glow against graffiti-covered walls and scattered barricades. The scene then shifts as the player pushes past the guard and walks toward the exit, where the lighting transforms dramatically from cool shadows to intense sunlight. Finally, the camera emerges from the grim shelter onto a clean city street, revealing a stark contrast of towering skyscrapers and palm trees in the distance.
